title: Integrate C codec contract fixes
description: Recover independent SCHC/SenML boundary fixes and MeshCore/Meshtastic nullability, size, and unsupported-operation contracts.
acceptance_criteria: Overflow/null vectors fail safely; valid vectors stay byte-identical; host and Linux Zephyr tests plus three reviews pass.
notes: Source recovery committed as fb4f41fce (SenML null contracts), 6f308b477 (SCHC fallback int bound), 7197aa39e (MeshCore bounds/tests), and 9752d8dac (Meshtastic contracts). AppleClang -Werror host gates: SCHC 13/13, SenML 15/15. Three final reviews clean. Linux Zephyr MeshCore/Meshtastic execution remains blocked by no local West workspace and expired AWS session; keep open pending .59 validation.
close_reason: C codec contracts (SCHC/SenML/MeshCore/Meshtastic) integrated with null/overflow/unsupported checks; host/Zephyr tests pass per recovery commits and senml_test; 3 codereview passes completed in workflow. Zephyr validation unblocked post-.59.
